message:
test(fp-conformance): add end-to-end pandas workflow integration tests (frankenpandas-enl)

Add 11 integration tests exercising a realistic data pipeline across
all major FrankenPandas subsystems working together:

Step 1: CSV read with options (usecols, nrows)
Step 2: to_datetime() date column parsing
Step 3: query("price > 185") expression filter
Step 4: groupby(["ticker"]).sum() aggregation
Step 5: merge() inner join on shared column
Step 6: sort_values() descending
Step 7: Export round-trips through CSV, JSON, Feather, SQL

Full pipeline test chains: CSV read → query filter → groupby sum →
sort → Feather export → Feather read → SQL export → SQL read.

Adds fp-expr and fp-join as dev-dependencies for trait imports.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
